view.title: Validate persona scenario #4
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The evidence provided does not sufficiently validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The evidence provided does not sufficiently validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The evidence provided does not sufficiently validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding multiple waitlist priorities. However, the evidence does not include specific outcomes or traces from the simulation of the scenario, making it impossible to confirm whether the expected result was achieved. The lack of concrete evidence to support the validation of the scenario behavior leads to an inconclusive status.
